name: LG_UPDATE_CLTRANS_323_02
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATE_CLTRANS_323_02
       @COEF        SMALLINT,
       @DATE        DATETIME,
       @TRCODE      SMALLINT,
       @SIGN        SMALLINT,
       @TRAMOUNT    FLOAT,
       @TRREPORTNET FLOAT,
       @CLIENTREF   INT,
       @MODULENR    SMALLINT,
       @CANCELLED   SMALLINT,
       @REPORTRATE  FLOAT,
       @SOURCEFREF  INT,
       @STATUS      SMALLINT,
       @MONTH      SMALLINT,
       @YEAR      SMALLINT,
       @AFFECTCOLLATRL SMALLINT,
       @AFFECTRISK SMALLINT AS
DECLARE @MON        SMALLINT
DECLARE @CALCSIGN   SMALLINT
DECLARE @ACTIVE     SMALLINT
DECLARE @PASSIVE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @EPSILON    FLOAT
DECLARE @AMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @REPORTNET  FLOAT
DECLARE @FND        SMALLINT
DECLARE @LOCALTYPE  SMALLINT
DECLARE @CURRTYPE   SMALLINT
DECLARE @NUMSREF    INT
DECLARE @NEWLREF    INT
DECLARE @RISKTYPE   SMALLINT
DECLARE @DEBITINC   FLOAT
DECLARE @CREDITINC  FLOAT
DECLARE @RISKINC    FLOAT
DECLARE @PAIDINCASHINV INT
DECLARE @par_Year       SMALLINT
SELECT @ACTIVE  = 0
SELECT @PASSIVE = 1
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001
SELECT @LOCALTYPE = 1
SELECT @CURRTYPE = 2
SELECT @MON = ISNULL(@MONTH, 0), @par_Year = ISNULL(@YEAR, 0)
IF ((@MON = 0) OR (@par_Year = 0 ) )
 EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_323_02 @DATE, @MON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
IF (@TRCODE <> 12) AND (@CANCELLED = 0) AND ((@STATUS = 0) OR (@STATUS IS NULL))
  BEGIN IF (@TRCODE = 14)
          BEGIN
               SELECT @MON  = 0
               SELECT @par_Year = @par_Year
          END
        ELSE IF ((@MON = 0) OR (@par_Year = 0 ) )
             EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_323_02 @DATE, @MON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
        SELECT @PAIDINCASHINV = 0
        IF ((@TRCODE >= 31) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)) OR (@TRCODE = 56)
         BEGIN IF EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_02_INVOICE
                          WHERE (LOGICALREF = @SOURCEFREF))
                SELECT @PAIDINCASHINV = PAIDINCASH
                 FROM LG_323_02_INVOICE
                 WHERE LOGICALREF = @SOURCEFREF
         END
        SELECT @CALCSIGN = @SIGN
        IF (@TRAMOUNT < 0) OR (@TRREPORTNET < 0)
          IF (@CALCSIGN = 1)
            SELECT @CALCSIGN = 0
          ELSE SELECT @CALCSIGN = 1
        SELECT @AMOUNT = ABS(@TRAMOUNT)
        SELECT @REPORTNET = ABS(@TRREPORTNET)
        IF @AMOUNT > @EPSILON
          BEGIN
                IF @CALCSIGN = @ACTIVE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = @AMOUNT
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = 0
                  END
                ELSE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = @AMOUNT
                  END
                IF @PAIDINCASHINV = 1
                 BEGIN IF @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @DEBITINC = @CREDITINC
                       ELSE SELECT @CREDITINC = @DEBITINC
                 END
                SELECT @DEBITINC = @COEF * @DEBITINC
                SELECT @CREDITINC = @COEF * @CREDITINC
                IF (@MODULENR <> 6) AND (@MODULENR <> 61) AND (@PAIDINCASHINV = 0) AND (ISNULL(@AFFECTRISK,0) = 0)
                  BEGIN EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_323_02 @CLIENTREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
                        IF @SIGN = 0
                          SELECT @RISKINC = @COEF * @AMOUNT
                        ELSE SELECT @RISKINC = -1 * (@COEF * @AMOUNT)
                       UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
                              SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKINC,
                                  ACCRISKTOTAL = ACCRISKTOTAL + @RISKINC
                              WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF
                       IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0)
                         BEGIN SELECT @RISKINC = @RISKINC / @REPORTRATE
                               UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
                                      SET REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @RISKINC,
                                          REPACCRISKTOTAL = REPACCRISKTOTAL + @RISKINC
                                      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF
                         END
                  END
                IF (@MODULENR <> 6 ) AND (@MODULENR <>61) AND (@PAIDINCASHINV = 0)  AND (@AFFECTCOLLATRL = 1)
                  BEGIN EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_323_02 @CLIENTREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
                        IF @SIGN = 0
                          SELECT @RISKINC = @COEF * @AMOUNT
                        ELSE SELECT @RISKINC = -1 * (@COEF * @AMOUNT)
                       UPDATE LG_323_02_CLCOLLATRLRISK
                              SET RISKTOTAL = RISKTOTAL + @RISKINC
                              WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF
                       IF (@REPORTRATE <> 0)
                         BEGIN SELECT @RISKINC = @RISKINC / @REPORTRATE
                               UPDATE LG_323_02_CLCOLLATRLRISK
                                      SET REPRISKTOTAL = REPRISKTOTAL + @RISKINC
                                      WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF
                         END
                  END
          END
        IF @REPORTNET > @EPSILON
          BEGIN
                IF @CALCSIGN = @ACTIVE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = @REPORTNET
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = 0
                  END
                ELSE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = @REPORTNET
                  END
                IF @PAIDINCASHINV = 1
                 BEGIN IF @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @DEBITINC = @CREDITINC
                       ELSE SELECT @CREDITINC = @DEBITINC
                 END
                SELECT @DEBITINC = @COEF * @DEBITINC
                SELECT @CREDITINC = @COEF * @CREDITINC
          END
 END
